title: Mass-detector
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mass detectors''' were a type of sensory equipment used in an attempt to detect [[StealthX]]-model [[T-65XJ X-wing starfighter|X-wing fighters]] during the [[Swarm War]]. They were counteracted by the [[Gravitic amplitude modulator]]s carried by the modified [[T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter|XJ3 X-wings]] and proved ineffective at detecting the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. They were mainly used by the [[Chiss Ascendancy]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
